command_results.label: replace-ready doctor
command_results.stdout:
> daojie-yusheng@ verify:replace-ready:doctor /home/yuohira/mud-mmo-next
> node scripts/replace-ready-doctor.js

replace-ready doctor

说明: doctor 只回答环境是否齐备，不回答门禁已经通过，更不代表完整替换完成。

- local replace-ready: ready
- with-db replace-ready: ready
- proof with-db: ready (minimal auth/token/bootstrap proof chain)
- shadow target probe: missing SERVER_SHADOW_URL/SERVER_URL
- shadow replace-ready: missing SERVER_SHADOW_URL/SERVER_URL
- shadow destructive gm-database proof: missing SERVER_SHADOW_URL/SERVER_URL + SERVER_SHADOW_ALLOW_DESTRUCTIVE=1 + maintenance-active shadow target
- acceptance replace-ready: missing SERVER_SHADOW_URL/SERVER_URL
- full replace-ready: missing SERVER_SHADOW_URL/SERVER_URL

recommended commands:
- local: pnpm verify:replace-ready
- with-db: pnpm verify:replace-ready:with-db
- proof with-db: pnpm verify:replace-ready:proof:with-db  # minimal auth/token/bootstrap proof chain
- shadow: fix SERVER_SHADOW_URL/SERVER_URL so /health is reachable and /api/auth/gm/login is not 404, then run pnpm verify:replace-ready:shadow
- shadow destructive preflight: after the shadow target is correct, export SERVER_SHADOW_ALLOW_DESTRUCTIVE=1 during a maintenance window, then run pnpm verify:replace-ready:shadow:destructive:preflight
- shadow destructive: only after preflight says maintenance-active, run pnpm verify:replace-ready:shadow:destructive
- acceptance: fix the shadow target first, then run pnpm verify:replace-ready:acceptance
- full: export DATABASE_URL/SERVER_DATABASE_URL, SERVER_SHADOW_URL/SERVER_URL and SERVER_GM_PASSWORD/GM_PASSWORD first, then run pnpm verify:replace-ready:full

package-level current commands:
- pnpm verify:replace-ready
- pnpm verify:replace-ready:doctor
- pnpm verify:replace-ready:with-db
- pnpm verify:replace-ready:proof:with-db
- pnpm verify:replace-ready:shadow
- pnpm verify:replace-ready:shadow:destructive:preflight
- pnpm verify:replace-ready:shadow:destructive
- pnpm verify:replace-ready:acceptance
- pnpm verify:replace-ready:full

boundary summary:
- local/with-db: 自动 proof
- acceptance: local + shadow + gm
- full: with-db + gm-database + backup-persistence + shadow + gm
- shadow-destructive: 维护窗口 destructive proof；不等于日常替换完成
